description_long: This is a modern, box-style ambulance vehicle with a white exterior and blue 'AMBULANCE' signage on the sides and rear. The vehicle features a large, rectangular patient compartment with two hinged rear doors, each marked with the blue Star of Life symbol. Red emergency light bars are mounted on the roof at both the front and rear, and additional red lights are positioned along the upper edges. The cab is integrated with the patient compartment and displays a Ford-style grille and headlights. Blue and white medical insignia and text are visible on the doors and sides, and the vehicle rides on robust, white-rimmed wheels suitable for urban streets.
description: A white, boxy ambulance with blue medical signage, red emergency lights, and dual rear doors, designed for urban emergency response.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, windshield, side mirrors, and red emergency lights above the cab.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'AMBULANCE' text, medical insignia, and the length of the patient compartment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two hinged doors with Star of Life symbols, 'AMBULANCE' text, and rear emergency lights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible door, insignia, and emergency lighting.
attribute_ambulance_signage: Blue 'AMBULANCE' text and medical insignia on sides and rear, Star of Life symbols on rear doors.
